name: Gold Leaf & Chocolate Tiered Cake
description: An elegant two-tier masterpiece featuring textured gold frost and rich chocolate finish, topped with fresh roses.

name: Signature Strawberry Drip Cake
description: Classic white forest base with a rich dark chocolate drip, topped with fresh strawberries and whipped cream.

name: Chelsea FC & Frozen Theme Cake
description: A unique custom hybrid design featuring Chelsea FC branding and Frozen's Elsa for the ultimate fan celebration.

name: Classic Birthday Chocolate Drip
description: Elegant white frosting with a decadent chocolate drip, gold pearls, and custom 'Happy Birthday' topper.

name: Quilted Pearl Anniversary Cake
description: Two-tier green and white quilted design accented with edible gold pearls for weddings and anniversaries.

name: Spider-Man Hero Celebration
description: Action-packed Spider-Man themed cake with red and white textured frosting and custom character toppers.

name: Pink Ombre 'You're Loved' Cake
description: Soft pink to white ombre frosting with elegant whipped peaks. Perfect for showing someone they are special.

name: Yellow Sunburst Birthday Cake
description: Vibrant yellow ombre design with whipped cream swirls and custom birthday messaging.

name: Festive Christmas Drip Cake
description: Holiday-themed green frosting with chocolate drip and mistletoe accents. The centerpiece for your Christmas table.

name: Sofia the First Princess Cake
description: Two-tier purple and white princess-themed cake with floral accents and a large custom bow.
